name_cn:
【Vintage Delightful Pumpkin Bag】m51154 Monogram
Classic shape, large capacity, especially for carrying monogram shopping bags. Convenient for shopping or carrying documents. Shoulder bag with hook closure and multiple functional pockets.
Size 38x26x13cm
